items.title: Sprint star Gout Gout’s 200m record formally ratified by World Athletics
items.summary: Some scepticism had surrounded Australian’s under-20 world record Time of 19.67 officially recognised to end to doubts over validity World Athletics has eliminated any doubt ove...
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Sean McVay: If Aaron Donald is interested in a return, Rams are interested
items.summary: Aaron Donald told Jordan Schultz of The Schultz Report that he is considering a return.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Capsey, Knight lay World Cup marker as England romp to series victory
items.summary: Formidable fourth-wicket stand made light work of 181-run chase to complete come-from-behind win
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
